acceptanceCriteria: The adapter targets a different downstream lane from adapter-001 (at minimum one of: public-domain-translations, civic-open-data, caption-commons).
Routing logic uses media type and/or detected language to direct items to the correct lane.
Rights basis, jurisdiction, attribution, and share-alike obligations are propagated without loss.
The adapter is idempotent and does not create duplicate downstream records.
An end-to-end test confirms the target downstream project receives correctly-attributed items.
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass.
context: M3 requires at least 2 downstream lanes consuming the fan-out feed, with at least 1 downstream project shipping artifacts to beneficiaries. The second adapter wires a different downstream lane, either public-domain-translations for non-English cleared texts, or a structured-dataset lane such as civic-open-data. Depends on adapter-001. See PLAN.md (M3 exit criterion a).
objective: Build the second downstream adapter targeting a different lane from adapter-001 (e.g. translation lane for non-English items, or structured-dataset lane), routing cleared items by media type and detected language, propagating rights basis, jurisdiction, and attribution.
output: A second downstream adapter (TypeScript) committed via PR, with end-to-end tests.
title: Wire a 2nd downstream lane (translation or dataset)
